title: The Lads Client
description: This is The BEST Optimization Mod Pack (with a bunch of quality of life mods aswell) because I'm sick of Lunar & Badlion Client slowly becoming REALLY bloated with cosmetics and useless features.
body:
This is a modpack that is meant to increase your **performance**, giving you better FPS ingame, and overall making your system use **less resources** while incliding all of the **quality of life** features you could possibly need for any type of server!

**This modpack uses [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) as a base and completely adds onto it.**

*Note: make sure you set your Minimap to Fair Play, if you plan on playing on servers that dont allow regular minimap mods such as Hypixel*

**Crimson Forest Panorama Texture Pack:** [CurseForge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/better-fps-visuals-pack/files/5367504)
